name: Low Fat Seven Layer Tex-Mex Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 cup shredded low fat Monterey jack cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, stir together the refried beans and salsa.
2. Spread the bean mixture on a 9-inch platter or in a pie plate.
3. Spread the sour cream on top of the bean layer.
4. Spread the avocado dip on the sour cream.
5. Layer the shredded cheese, tomatoes, avocados, green onions, and olives on top.
6. If desired, cover and refrigerate for up to 4 hours.
7. Serve with tortilla chips. Yields 16 servings.
[Per Serving Calories 80 Fat 3 grams]
